subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath manifested Himself through the light of His grace in the realm of unity, when the Primal Point appeared and was made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بنیر فضله فی عالم الاحدیه اذا ظهرت النقطه الاولیه و اظهرها
subcodes.subjects: @creation of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution
